violations.text: The double doors to the outside, located in the (front), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Floor located in the (walk-in freezer) was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (grout missing in certain areas allowing for pooling water and further cracking of tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024

Ham and liquid egg were observed held at 60 & 68 degrees Fahrenheit respectively. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumultion of debris: 1) Electrical outlets and shelves under food prep areas had food debris and residue 2) Light fixtures above prep area had dust 3) Fans and fan covers in walk-in cooler had dust and biofilm 4) A cold hold unit had a large amount of pooling water inside of it New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (grout missing in certain areas allowing for pooling water and further cracking of tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must be wash, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 08/22/2023

Establishment was using time as a public health control for deli sliced ham. Ham was observed at 70 degrees. Ham was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment shall no longer use time as a control for ham. Inspector printed out approval letter for other ingredients. Establishment to keep letter in store. PIC to instruct all staff that time may no longer be used for ham. Ham must be stored 41 degrees or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine was turned off to be wash rinsed and sanitized once emptied. Inspector recommends adding a log to side of unit to ensure establishment is following store policy of cleaning 1x monthly. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
